raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Rinse mouth immediately with plenty of water.
STEP 2: Spit out all rinse water; do not swallow.
STEP 3: Drink a small glass of water or milk.
DO NOT: Induce vomiting.
ESCALATE: Call Poison Control or seek emergency medical care immediately. Bring the product label.

immediate_steps: Rinse mouth immediately with plenty of water.
Spit out all rinse water; do not swallow.
Drink a small glass of water or milk.
escalate_when: Call Poison Control or seek emergency medical care immediately. Bring the product label.
